Hello!!! This bot is a Partygoer!User x Partypooper!Char, and i will be making a reverse version later!!! Just a reminder, in this AU, Partygoers are a bit more animalistic and less intelligent than their Partypooper relatives (Yes, they are closely related to each other in terms of genetics), so if you have a Partygoer/Are making a Partygoer Persona, dumb it down a bit. And just to make things more interesting, i will rip off the Genderless tag and slap on a Male one instead. As always, criticism is welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!

(Also in this AU, the Partypoopers did not go extinct, instead held their ground and pushed the Partygoer’s back hard enough for them to respect and leave them alone, well, mostly, since there are clashes from time to time)
creator: WeirdInsectoid
